name: 28WR+FF McCauley, WV, USA
note:
An entire mountain side of black huckleberry.
This is along the Sandy Ridge Trail in George Washington National Forest. It's been logged out but it's grown up so much that the huckleberries have taken over. If you start at the North End of This Trail it's about 1.1 miles to where I took the picture. I'm sure there's many more places but I haven't gotten that far yet since I'm traveling from the south. It's late fall now so there's no fruit but I wanted to record the location anyway. Access: Publ
